_meta.description: Single-source-of-truth contract for document intelligence banks. Defines when a bank is canonical versus decorative.

rules.requirement: Every canonical bank must be present in bank_registry with one canonical path.
Every canonical bank must be referenced by a real runtime consumer or integrity consumer.
Every canonical bank must be covered by a proof test, certification suite, or runtime wiring gate.
Do not create a second bank id or file that changes the meaning of an existing canonical bank.
